news.headline: US charges Cuba's Raúl Castro with murder over 1996 downing of two planes
news.summary: Cuba's current president says the charges against Castro - including conspiracy to kill US nationals and destruction of aircraft - are a "political manoeuvre".

news.headline: The French Civil Servant Accused of Drugging More Than 100 Women
news.summary: For years, prosecutors have accused Christian Nègre, once a senior official, of slipping diuretics into women’s drinks. Despite admitting to some accusations in an interview with a French daily, he is yet to stand trial.
